Hard Money lending is something your agents should know about in the event that conventional financing through your in-house lender isn’t available. It gives them an opportunity to save their deals and continue their success. Many people use Hard Money loans as a business tactic/strategy to close quickly and without the red tape you get with big banks.

We are a full-service mortgage banker specializing in the origination of all types of non-traditional real estate loans. My goal is to educate your agents and offer creative, flexible ways to fund their clients’ transactions.
